name: GumballZERO
description: BE REAL | BE ADRIAN | GumballZERO by HalfxTiger

metadata.description: Serie cerrada 100 NFTs GumballZERO — todos generation=0, skinName=Light

tokenIdRange.note: Placeholder range removed. TokenIds are non-contiguous; resolved via on-chain tag + ordinal index.

caveats: v8: COLECCIÓN LIMPIA. Common 70%=2t / 30%=3t. Uncommon 3t. Rare 4-5t. Legendary 5-6t.
BG sólido ≥80%. Patterned cap=15. Stacking solo en Rare/Legendary.
metadata.format: collection[i] = ordinal index i (0-based, i.e. first-minted = index 0). TokenId is assigned at mint time (non-contiguous global counter). Lookup: sort getTokensByTag(Diamond,GumballZERO) ascending -> position = index.
